## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production updates, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [MCP and AI-related content production is ramping up, with 25 approved topics and outlines ready for drafting](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [A new glossary template was proposed, aiming to build topical authority and provide more value than standard definitions](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Traffic metrics are holding steady, with slight improvements in click-through rates and average positions](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Consideration of alternative content presentation strategies, such as guides or specialized sections, to improve reach and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

## Topics

### MCP Content Strategy

  - [Dan approved additional MCP-related topics after a roadmap call, recognizing their value](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [25 approved topics and outlines ready, with 12+ focused on MCP](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [40+ additional MCP cluster topics prepared for future use](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Team to start receiving MCP article drafts from tomorrow onwards](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Ashur noted longer review times for MCP spec-related content due to necessary accuracy checks](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

### Glossary Template and Strategy

  - [New glossary template proposed with sections including definition, business context, technical explanation, common challenges, and Aembit's relevance](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Template aims to provide more value than standard definitions, building topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Current list includes 95 terms, combining Aembit's existing glossary and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Target length for glossary entries estimated around 700 words](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on the proposed template](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Six articles revised and ready for review, with two more lined up](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Two articles ready for immediate publication](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [New Slack notification system set up for article assignments](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Consideration of alternative content presentation strategies, such as guides or specialized sections, to improve reach and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

### Traffic and Performance Update

  - [Overall traffic holding steady week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Slight improvements in click-through rates and average positions](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [New article on "Four Stages of AI Agent Evolution" received positive engagement (9 clicks, 9 users)](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Agentic AI topics consistently receiving multiple views weekly](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to review and provide feedback on the proposed glossary template](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin drafting MCP-related articles based on approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Aembit team to review incoming MCP article drafts and provide timely feedback](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Continue monitoring traffic and engagement metrics for newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating a comprehensive "Guide to MCP Security" after individual articles are completed](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
  - [Dan to get an update on the progress of web development work](https://fathom.video/share/z6vPzQPz445NWkxpr6a3yWpji8FnNnZe?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
